tool.name: cve_lookup
tool.description: Query CVE databases and match vulnerabilities against technologies.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Look up specific CVE details by ID - Search CVEs by keywords - Find CVEs for a specific product and version - Identify exploit availability for vulnerabilities - Get remediation recommendations

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The lookup action to perform: - lookup: Look up specific CVE by ID - search: Search CVEs by keyword - by_product: Find CVEs for a specific product/version

parameter.name: cve_id
parameter.description: CVE ID to look up (e.g., "CVE-2021-44228"). Required for lookup action.

parameter.name: query
parameter.description: Search query for keywords. Required for search action.

parameter.name: product
parameter.description: Product name for CPE matching. Required for by_product action.

parameter.name: version
parameter.description: Optional product version for more specific matching

returns.description: CVE information including description, CVSS scores, affected versions, exploit availability, and references

tool.examples:
# Look up specific CVE
lookup CVE-2021-44228
# Search for vulnerabilities
search log4j
# Find CVEs by product
by_product Apache Log4j 2.14.0
